name: QR Code Generator
description: Turn any URL into a scannable QR code. Every code you generate is saved locally so you can reopen it later.
details:
Paste any link and get an instant, scannable QR code — no account, no internet round-trip beyond generating the image itself.

Every code you make is kept in a local history so you can come back and re-download or re-share it later without retyping the URL.
